# Soupy Together

> Cost-disciplined multi-agent orchestration for AI coding. SACE classifies each request, routes it to the cheapest tool that can handle it, and publishes side-by-side build-offs with measured cost, time, and quality.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Architecture overview, tier system, pricing comparison, papers.
- [Try Demo](/demo): Live tier classification and partner routing for any build prompt.
- [Build-Off](/build-off): Public benchmarks — same prompt through every integrated AI coding tool, scored on cost, fidelity, correctness.
- [Partners](/partners): How AI labs and tool vendors join the SACE roster. No pay-to-win.
